ctaText: Rental kits are limited. Tell us your dates and where you plan to use Starlink, and we will confirm availability and provide pricing for your rental period. You can also call us at (705) 457-2156.
html:
Starlink Rental

PORTABLE SATELLITE INTERNET

Need high-speed internet at the cottage, on the road, or at a remote job site? Rent a fully configured Starlink Gen2 kit from McKee Security and take the fastest Roam service with you anywhere coverage allows.

What is Starlink Rental?

Starlink Rental gives you a ready-to-use satellite internet kit without buying hardware or managing your own account setup. Our kits are pre-configured, tested, and running the highest Roam plan so you can plug in, power up, and connect almost anywhere the Starlink constellation reaches.

How the Starlink Constellation Works

Starlink uses a large low-Earth orbit satellite constellation to deliver broadband where cable and fibre cannot reach. Instead of one distant satellite, hundreds of satellites work together to hand off your connection as they pass overhead, keeping latency low and speeds high even in rural and mobile environments.

Low-Earth Orbit Wide Coverage Low Latency Mobile Ready Works Off-Grid

Gen2 Kits, Ready to Go

Our rental dishes are Starlink Gen2 hardware. You do not need to manually point the dish. The built-in actuated motor automatically aligns itself to the sky, finds the constellation, and maintains a strong link while you focus on your trip, project, or event.

Gen2 Hardware Auto-Pointing Motor Pre-Configured Latest Firmware Fast Setup

Roam Max Service Included

Every rental includes the full Roam Max plan, Starlink's highest mobile tier. Take the kit anywhere service is available, from cottage country to cross-country travel. You get the fastest speeds and priority access the plan allows, without upgrading accounts or swapping hardware yourself.

Roam Max Plan Use Anywhere Fastest Speeds Priority Access No Plan Shopping

How Rental Works

Flexible terms, simple pickup and return, and a kit that arrives ready to connect.

Flexible Duration

Rent for a weekend, a week, a month, or longer. Tell us your dates and we will work out pricing based on how long you need the kit.

Pickup & Return

Collect your kit at our Haliburton office at 4702 Haliburton County Rd 21 and return it to the same location when you are finished. Our team walks you through setup before you leave.

Everything Configured

Dish, router, cables, and power are tested and configured before pickup. Power up at your destination and connect without rebuilding the system yourself.

What's Included

A complete mobile internet solution from a team that installs Starlink professionally every day.

Ready-to-Rent Kit

Starlink Gen2 dish with actuated auto-pointing, Wi-Fi router, power supply, and cabling, all verified before handoff.

Roam Max Connectivity

The highest Roam tier is active on the kit for the rental period so you get the best speeds Starlink offers on the go.

Local Support

Questions before pickup, during your rental, or at return? Call our Haliburton team. We know these systems inside and out.

Availability Based

Rental kits are limited. Contact us to confirm current availability, your dates, and whether a unit is reserved or ready for pickup.

Why Rent from McKee Security?

We install Starlink across cottage country year-round. Rental kits are maintained by the same technicians who mount permanent systems for our customers.

Professionally Maintained

Every rental unit is checked, updated, and configured by our in-house team before it goes out the door.

Built for Cottage Country

We understand remote properties, seasonal use, and the connectivity challenges that come with life in the Haliburton region.

Easy to Inquire

No published rate cards. Share your dates and location, and we will confirm availability and pricing for your rental.

Check Availability & Pricing

Starlink rental kits are limited and reserved on a first-come basis. Call us at (705) 457-2156 or use the inquiry form below with your dates, pickup timing, and where you plan to use the kit. We will confirm whether a unit is available and provide pricing for your rental period.
